upload.heading: Upload learning materials
upload.lead: Upload lecture slides, handouts, scripts, or worksheets. Files are converted to text locally in your browser and never leave your device — only the extracted text is sent to your chosen LLM provider.
upload.dropzone: Drop files here or click to select
upload.formats: Supported: PDF, DOCX, PPTX, TXT, MD — max. 50 MB per file
configure.heading: Configure LLM & questions
configure.lead: Pick an LLM provider and enter your API key. The key stays in your browser.
configure.provider.notice: Your selected provider will receive the full extracted text of your files. That provider's terms and privacy policy apply.
configure.custom_prompt.hint: Available placeholders: {difficulty}, {difficulty_hint}, {style}, {style_hint}, {output_language}. Tip: for domain-specific questions, add the subject area or desired question types here.
configure.custom_prompt.warning: ⚠ The prompt must instruct the model to output JSON matching the schema. If you remove the schema block, parsing will fail.
configure.savekey.warning: ⚠ Saved keys live in your browser's localStorage. Do not enable on shared or public machines.
configure.options.heading: Question options
provider.compat.title: Local / OpenAI-compatible
provider.model.hint.compat: e.g. openai/gpt-oss-120b (RWTH HPC) or your provider's model ID
generate.heading: Generate questions
generate.lead: Click "Generate" to create multiple-choice questions from your material.
review.heading: Review & Export
review.summary: {n} question|{n} questions generated from {m} file|{n} questions generated from {m} files.
table.question: Question
preview.title: Text preview
error.network: Connection error. Check URL and network.
error.api.key: The API key was rejected. Please check the key and model.
error.api.rate: The provider is rate-limiting your requests. Wait a moment and retry.
error.llm.json: The response could not be parsed as JSON.
error.llm.schema: The response does not match the expected format.
